message:
chore(gitignore): ignore /opencode.json (user-local, contains bearer token)

Local opencode.json populated by the user's MCP bridge carries a real
bearer token and should never be committed. Anchored path so we don't
collide with any shared opencode.json that might appear under a
subdirectory later.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -273,3 +273,6 @@ test_screenshot.png
 
 # SQLite activity lock files
 *.activity.lock
+
+# OpenCode config (user-local; contains bearer tokens)
+/opencode.json
